name: humanizer-plugin
description: Fact-safe Codex plugin for removing signs of AI-generated writing.

interface.longDescription: A Codex writing editor that identifies common AI-writing patterns and rewrites text to sound more natural while preserving meaning, voice, factual integrity, and quality through a private checklist and scoring gate.
defaultPrompt: Match my writing sample and rewrite this.
Audit and score this draft for AI-writing patterns.
